channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Military AI is here. Some experts are worried
item.description: For the first two-and-a-half years of the generative AI revolution, the AI arms race has been waged between competing companies seeking to make bank from the promise and potential of the technology. But things are maturing in the AI world—and with it, there’s another frontline for AI: the military.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft Drops Support for Remote Desktop App, Transition to Windows App Required
item.description: Microsoft is dropping support for the Remote Desktop app on May 27, replacing it with a new unified gateway called Windows App. Users will need to manually uninstall and reinstall the new app to continue accessing services like Windows 365 and Azure Virtual Desktop.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Daredevil: Born Again episode 3 contains another Marvel reference to Spider-Man, but it's got nothing to do with Tom Holland's Peter Parker
item.description: Daredevil: Born Again's latest entry might have just confirmed the existence of another Spider-Man in the MCU.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Daredevil: Born Again episode 3's shocking final scene is a big misdirect, and I've got the evidence to back it up
item.description: That unexpectedly devastating moment in Daredevil: Born Again's third episode has nothing to do with a fan-favorite Marvel anti-hero.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: The Future of Search: Cloudflare's CEO on Reshaping the Internet
item.description: Cloudflare's Matthew Prince discusses the evolving search landscape and its impact on media companies and creators, proposing a three-step solution to address the issue.
item.dc:creator: Anna-Louise Jackson, Fast Company

item.title: Trump buys Tesla to 'make a statement' about Musk backlash
item.description: President Trump said Tuesday he was buying a Tesla vehicle as he doubled down on his support of Elon Musk, who has come under mounting scrutiny for leading the Trump administration's government cost initiatives. "I'm going to buy because number one, it's a great product. As good as it gets.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Lummis introduces bill to create bitcoin strategic reserve
item.description: Sen. Cynthia Lummis (R-Wyo.) reintroduced legislation Tuesday to create a bitcoin strategic reserve, seeking to codify President Trump’s executive order last week establishing a reserve.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Future PlayStation games could have AI-powered characters, if this leaked prototype of Aloy is anything to go by
item.description: AI-powered characters could feature in future PlayStation games, and the Horizon series could be the testbed with an AI Aloy.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How to deliver more secure capabilities to the warfighter, faster
item.description: Rethinking the delivery process for new capabilities is essential to put cybersecurity and the warfighter front and center. The post How to deliver more secure capabilities to the warfighter, faster first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Trump says TikTok deal is in the works. Here's where things stand with the company
item.description: In less than a month, TikTok could have one or a few new owners, be banned again, or simply receive another reprieve to continue operating in the United States.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Dangerous malware targets you through fake loan app
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says a malware app called SpyLend is posing as a financial tool, hitting 100,000-plus downloads.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he’s buying ‘brand new’ Tesla to support Musk
item.description: President Trump said he would be buying a “brand new” Tesla to support his senior adviser Elon Musk, as the stock market shows shares of the electric car company tumbling.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Weaviate adds agents to its tech stack to ease gen AI app development
item.description: Vector database provider Weaviate has added three new agents to its development stack to facilitate the development of generative AI-based applications. These agents are modular agentic workflows that use large language models (LLMs) and prompts to interact dynamically with data in Weaviate.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Elon Musk claims X being targeted in 'massive cyberattack' as service goes down
item.description: Hours after a series of outages Monday that left X unavailable to thousands of users, Elon Musk claimed that the social media platform was being targeted in a “massive cyberattack.” “We get attacked every day, but this was done with a lot of resources," Musk claimed in a post.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wyoming billionaire 1 of 4 in race to buy TikTok
item.description: Wyoming entrepreneur Reid Raisner told "NewsNation Live" on Monday that the fate of TikTok is a matter of U.S. national security.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Microsoft is developing its own AI models to compete with OpenAI
item.description: One of the hottest trends right now involves work on reasoning AI models — tools that can more or less arrive at the right conclusion on their own. (The best-known reasoning models at the moment are the Chinese Deepseek-R1, as well as o1 and o3-mini from OpenAI.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: X outage affects thousands of users
item.description: An outage on the social platform X appeared to impact thousands of users on Monday morning. According to outage-tracking website Downdetector.com, more than 37,000 users reported problems with the platform shortly before 10 a.m. EDT on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Transferring data from old laptop to new one
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson talks about how to smoothly transfer your data from an old laptop to a new one using cloud storage or external drives.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Building generative AI? Get ready for generative UI
item.description: There’s currently no stopping generative AI spending. Analyst firm Omdia expects spending on generative AI applications to hit $58 billion by 2028. Yet while this level of investment is a significant amount, actual deployment of generative AI applications is still slow.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New delivery robot can haul 2,200 pounds of your stuff
item.description: WeRide's unmanned electric delivery van, the Robovan W5, has 194 cubic feet of cargo space and can carry payloads up to about 2,205 pounds
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: JFrog unveils JFrog ML for MLOps
item.description: JFrog has released JFrog ML, an MLOps solution designed to bring devops best practices to building, deploying, managing, and monitoring AI/ML workflows.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Lenovo introduces compact, liquid-cooled AI edge server
item.description: Lenovo has announced the ThinkEdge SE100, an entry-level AI inferencing server that’s designed to make edge AI affordable for enterprises as well as small and medium-sized businesses. AI systems are not normally small and compact; they’re big, decked out servers with lots of memory, GPUs, and CPUs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump says he will 'probably' extend TikTok ban deadline if deal isn't reached in time
item.description: "We have a lot of interest in TikTok. China is going to play a role, so hopefully China will approve of the deal," Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Siemens announces $285 million investment in US manufacturing
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Siemens plans to invest $285 million in manufacturing in the United States, the tech company said Thursday, including two new facilities in California and Texas. The U.S. is the largest market for the company. The recent investments in the Siemens' U.S.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, NewsNation
